task_description: Migrate Kiro Quest from Cloudflare Workers to AWS (S3 + CloudFront) and evolve the architecture to include serverless backend (Lambda + API Gateway), DynamoDB for persistence, Cognito for Gmail SSO authentication, IaC with CDK, CI/CD with GitHub Actions, and DNS/HTTPS with Route 53 + ACM. All optimized for AWS Free Tier (zero or low cost).
